top_signals.title: China’s High-Profile Funds Ditch Consumer Stocks to Chase AI
top_signals.summary: Some high-profile Chinese funds heavily invested in consumer names are pivoting to AI stocks, a bet that may boost returns but also leaves them more vulnerable to the sector’s volatility.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
